raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"assistant_self_statement","confidence":0.97,"matched_text":"As an AI language model, I don't have personal opinions about any matter, including the controversy around the Lincoln Memorial.","distilled_fact":"The assistant does not have personal opinions about any matter, including the controversy around the Lincoln Memorial."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"general_statement","confidence":0.78,"matched_text":"debates and controversies over public monuments and memorials are natural and often arise in response to evolving social and political contexts.","distilled_fact":"Debates and controversies over public monuments and memorials are natural and often arise in response to evolving social and political contexts."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"general_statement","confidence":0.72,"matched_text":"debates over what should be included or excluded from memorials may call attention to previously neglected or marginalized voices.","distilled_fact":"Debates over what should be included or excluded from memorials may call attention to previously neglected or marginalized voices."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"general_statement","confidence":0.71,"matched_text":"controversies can also be divisive and controversial, and they can overshadow the intended meaning and significance of a memorial.","distilled_fact":"Controversies can be divisive and controversial, and they can overshadow the intended meaning and significance of a memorial."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"general_statement","confidence":0.68,"matched_text":"how any controversy is resolved will depend on the specific circumstances and on the diversity of perspectives and opinions involved.","distilled_fact":"How any controversy is resolved will depend on the specific circumstances and on the diversity of perspectives and opinions involved."}]}
